function.name: add_chore
function.description: Create a new recurring chore for the user. Use this when the user wants to start tracking a new chore, e.g. 'remind me to water the plants every 3 days'. Errors if a chore with the same name already exists — use update_chore instead in that case.

name.description: The name of the chore, e.g. 'Water plants'

interval_days.description: How often the chore should be repeated, in days (e.g. 3 for every 3 days)

grace_days.description: Optional grace period in days after the interval passes before the chore is considered overdue (default: 3)

function.name: list_outstanding_chores
function.description: List all of the user's chores that are currently due or overdue. Use this when the user asks what's due, pending, or outstanding.

function.name: complete_chore
function.description: Mark a chore as done right now. Use this when the user says they've completed a chore, e.g. 'I did the dishes' or 'watered the plants just now'. Optionally records a remark about the completion.

name.description: The name of the chore that was completed

remark.description: Optional remark about how the chore went, e.g. 'took longer than usual'

function.name: update_chore
function.description: Change the interval and/or grace period of an existing chore. Use this when the user wants to reschedule a chore or adjust how much grace it gets before being marked overdue. At least one of interval_days or grace_days must be provided.

name.description: The name of the existing chore to update

interval_days.description: New interval in days between repetitions of the chore

grace_days.description: New grace period in days after the interval passes before the chore is considered overdue
